summary: Comprehensive testing of BJP Leaders platform completed successfully. All backend APIs working (26/26 tests passed). Frontend functionality verified including admin login, geography management, and public forms.

design_issues.issue: React setState warning during render in BrowserRouter/AdminLogin components

passed_tests: Geography Manager - Add constituency (Malakpet Assembly created)
Public homepage displays constituencies and leaders
Get Involved page - Grievance form accessible and functional
Admin dashboard loads with proper navigation
All CRUD operations for constituencies, sub-regions, leaders, articles, grievances, volunteers, events
Public website navigation and branding correct
